code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
        let toggled = b ^ 32
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(toggled)}"
      else
        result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  print(result)
when None
  print("")
end
